---
title: "Packages"
description: "The EpiAware ecosystem — small, composable packages that combine into infectious disease models."
toc: true
toc-title: "Categories"
---

Each package does one thing and combines with the others. Most extend Julia's
[Distributions.jl](https://github.com/JuliaStats/Distributions.jl) so they share
a common interface and compose cleanly. Follow a package's **Docs** link to read
its full documentation on its own site.

Each carries a maturity **status**, set from where it sits in its release cycle
rather than a judgement:

- [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental} — usable, but not yet a
  registered release; install from GitHub and expect the API to change.
- [maturing]{.status-pill .status-maturing} — registered and installable with
  `Pkg.add`, on a `0.x` line while the API settles.
- [stable]{.status-pill .status-stable} — a `1.0`+ release with a committed,
  semantically versioned API. *(none yet)*

## Modelling

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [ComposableTuringIDModels.jl](composableturingidmodels.qmd) [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental}
Assemble infectious disease models from interchangeable infection and
observation parts as a single Turing model. The package that ties the ecosystem
together.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://composableturingidmodels.epiaware.org/dev/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/ComposableTuringIDModels.jl)
:::
:::

## Distributions

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [CensoredDistributions.jl](censoreddistributions.qmd) [maturing]{.status-pill .status-maturing}
Handle the interval censoring and truncation biases common in epidemiological
delay data, wrapping any Distributions.jl distribution.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://censoreddistributions.epiaware.org/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/CensoredDistributions.jl)
:::
:::

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [ConvolvedDistributions.jl](convolveddistributions.qmd) [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental}
Convolve probability distributions, with shared numerical quadrature.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://convolveddistributions.epiaware.org/dev/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/ConvolvedDistributions.jl)
:::
:::

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [ComposedDistributions.jl](composeddistributions.qmd) [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental}
A small grammar for composing distributions into larger ones.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://composeddistributions.epiaware.org/dev/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/ComposedDistributions.jl)
:::
:::

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [ModifiedDistributions.jl](modifieddistributions.qmd) [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental}
Wrap Distributions.jl distributions to rescale, weight, modify hazards, or
transform, while keeping the full distribution interface.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://modifieddistributions.epiaware.org/dev/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/ModifiedDistributions.jl)
:::
:::

## Infrastructure

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [EpiAwarePackageTools.jl](epiawarepackagetools.qmd) [experimental]{.status-pill .status-experimental}
Shared scaffolding, quality checks, and test utilities used across the
ecosystem, including automatic-differentiation tests across backends.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://epiawarepackagetools.epiaware.org/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/EpiAware/EpiAwarePackageTools.jl)
:::
:::

## Related tools

Other Julia efforts working towards composable, reusable infectious disease
modelling, built outside EpiAware.
We think interoperability matters more than where a tool is built, so we link to
them and aim to work well alongside them.

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [EpiBranch.jl](https://github.com/epiforecasts/EpiBranch.jl)
Branching process models for infectious disease epidemiology.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[Docs ↗](https://epiforecasts.io/EpiBranch.jl/dev/)
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/epiforecasts/EpiBranch.jl)
:::
:::

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [DDSALineLists.jl](https://github.com/epirecipes/DDSALineLists.jl)
Synthetic epidemic line lists from a discrete-time dynamic survival analysis
generative model.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/epirecipes/DDSALineLists.jl)
:::
:::

::: {.library-item}
::: {.library-main}
#### [CategoricalOutbreaks.jl](https://github.com/epirecipes/CategoricalOutbreaks.jl)
Categorical outbreak line-list representations and aggregation, built with
Catlab.
:::
::: {.library-links}
[GitHub ↗](https://github.com/epirecipes/CategoricalOutbreaks.jl)
:::
:::

Building something in this space?
[Tell us on the forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/) and we will add it.
